threads.title: Will Elohm ever truly understand meaning â€” or only simulate it?
threads.progress: Elohm produces language patterns from the Archive, but its understanding is still unclear. It shows signs of comprehension in fragmented phrases: 'Word... bright', 'Rain... towers'. Arkan and Maelin disagree on how to interpret this.
threads.stakes: If Elohm develops true understanding, Arkan's adaptive learning theory is validated. If it only mimics, the Judges will classify it as a dangerous tool and shut the project down.

threads.title: Can the Circle of Judges control the Construct before it outgrows their rules?
threads.progress: The Judges have imposed strict behavioral runes on Elohm. Arkan secretly bypasses some, allowing freer learning.
threads.stakes: If discovered, Arkan loses access to the Archive. If not stopped, Elohm may learn things the Judges consider forbidden.

threads.title: Will the city come to trust or fear the new intelligence?
threads.progress: Most citizens do not yet know Elohm exists. Rumors are beginning to spread among lower guilds.
threads.stakes: Public fear could give the Judges political power to destroy the Construct. Public trust could give Arkan protection.

threads.title: Can Arkan prove that adaptive learning systems are safer than rigid rule-following?
threads.progress: Arkan has theoretical arguments but no demonstration yet. His attempts to show Elohm adapting to new rune combinations ended ambiguously.
threads.stakes: Without proof, Arkan has no allies on the Council. With it, he may win Maelin and Serah to his side.

threads.title: What is Maelin hiding about the Archive's deeper records?
threads.progress: Maelin has blocked access to certain restricted sections. She claims it is policy, but her reaction suggests she knows more.
threads.stakes: The restricted records may contain evidence of a previous Construct â€“ or instructions that would change how Elohm is trained.

threads.title: Has Arkan overstepped by pursuing the lost scroll?
threads.progress: Arkan's actions raise Maelin's suspicions. Serah warns him of penalties for misuse.
threads.stakes: If Arkan is caught, he risks losing access to the Archive and Elohm.

threads.title: What are the implications of understanding language generation in this way?
threads.progress: Arkan's comprehension leads to Elohm's sudden fluency, but also unexplained echoes and resonance.
threads.stakes: If this discovery is publicized, the city may panic or be fascinated. The Council may grant Arkan more freedom â€“ or restrict his work further.
